title: When a value is greater x and less than y automation
excerpt:
Hi, I’m trying to do an automation where if a value is > x and < y, the status changes. 
I’ve been able to do an automation for > or <, but haven’t figured out how to combine together.

posts.author: ryomtov (Robert Yomtov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m trying to do an automation where if a value is > x and < y, the status changes.

I’ve been able to do an automation for > or <, but haven’t figured out how to combine together.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ryomtov

You can add multiple conditions to automations by clicking the + in the condition section of the automation:
